escalations.title: protobufjs <7.5.5 — Arbitrary Code Execution (CVSS 9.8)
escalations.description: Protobuf message parsing allows arbitrary code execution without authentication. RCE in production if untrusted protobuf messages are processed.
escalations.exploit_scenario: Attacker sends a crafted protobuf message to the portal backend. The vulnerable protobufjs parser executes arbitrary JavaScript in the process context.
escalations.impact: Full remote code execution on the server hosting portal/Backend.
escalations.assessment_request: Confirm whether portal/Backend processes untrusted protobuf messages from the network; if yes, treat as zero-day requiring emergency patching.

escalations.title: handlebars 4.7.8 — 7 Injection CVEs (CVSS up to 9.8)
escalations.description: Multiple code injection and prototype pollution vectors allow attacker to execute code via malformed handlebars templates.
escalations.exploit_scenario: If any user-controlled string reaches a handlebars template render call, attacker can inject template syntax to execute arbitrary JavaScript server-side.
escalations.impact: Remote code execution, data exfiltration, prototype pollution leading to privilege escalation.
escalations.fix: Find parent dependency via `npm list handlebars` and update it to require handlebars >=4.7.9
escalations.assessment_request: Trace all handlebars render() call sites in Source/Backend — confirm whether any receive unsanitized user input.

p2_findings.title: Search route (FR-dependency-search) not implemented — dead endpoint breaks frontend
p2_findings.detail: FR-dependency-search requires GET /api/search?q= for cross-entity typeahead. A test file exists and documents the expected contract but states it will FAIL until implemented. No search.ts route file exists; app.ts does not register /api/search. The frontend workItemsApi.searchItems() calls this dead endpoint.
p2_findings.recommendation: Create Source/Backend/src/routes/search.ts filtering store.getAllItems() by title/description match; register in app.ts as app.use('/api/search', searchRouter).

p2_findings.title: dependencyCheckDuration Histogram missing from metrics.ts
p2_findings.detail: FR-dependency-metrics specifies 4 Prometheus instruments: dependencyOperations counter, dispatchGatingEvents counter, dependencyCheckDuration histogram, and cycleDetectionEvents counter. Only 3 are present; the Histogram is absent. CI does not catch this gap.
p2_findings.recommendation: Add export const dependencyCheckDurationHistogram = new Histogram({ name: 'dependency_check_duration_seconds', ... }) and instrument isReady/computeHasUnresolvedBlockers calls.
p2_findings.cross_ref: QO-011 (same root cause — metrics.ts lacks all histogram types)

p2_findings.title: API client reads body.message instead of body.error — all API error text silently swallowed
p2_findings.detail: Backend returns { error: 'message' } per CLAUDE.md architecture rule. Client reads body.message which is always undefined, so fallback 'Request failed: {status}' is returned for every error. No validation errors, 409 conflicts, or 404 messages ever reach the UI.
p2_findings.recommendation: Change body.message to body.error ?? body.message to handle both patterns.

p2_findings.title: Duplicate test files for WorkItemListPage and WorkItemDetailPage create ambiguity
p2_findings.detail: Both test files for each component are active with different test cases and assertions. Neither is a copy of the other. Creates ambiguity about authority, risks duplicate CI runs, and makes it easy to fix a bug in one while leaving it broken in the other.
p2_findings.recommendation: Consolidate into tests/pages/ (more structured), delete root-level duplicates, verify merged coverage is the union of both files.

p2_findings.title: Traceability enforcer only auto-selects one plan; dependency-linking plan reports 7 MISSING when targeted directly
p2_findings.detail: Enforcer picks the most recently modified requirements.md. When targeting Plans/dependency-linking/requirements.md explicitly, reports 7 MISSING (5 false positives from regex matching item IDs, 2 genuine gaps: FR-070 and FR-085 referenced but not in spec which ends at FR-069).
p2_findings.recommendation: 1) Tighten regex to FR-[A-Z]{2,}-\d+ to avoid matching non-FR IDs. 2) Remove/correct references to FR-070 and FR-085 in dependency-linking requirements.

p2_findings.title: uuid <14.0.0 — Buffer bounds check missing (CWE-787)
p2_findings.detail: Missing buffer bounds check in UUID v3/v5/v6 functions when external buffer is provided. Direct dependency in Source/Backend.
p2_findings.recommendation: cd Source/Backend && npm install uuid@^14.0.0 — major version bump, run all tests to verify no breaking changes.

p2_findings.title: path-to-regexp <0.1.13 — ReDoS via route parameters (CVSS 7.5)
p2_findings.detail: Multiple route parameters cause exponential regex backtracking leading to process hang. Attacker can trigger DoS by crafting pathological route parameter values.

p3_findings.title: OpenTelemetry tracing not implemented despite being an architecture requirement
p3_findings.recommendation: Add @opentelemetry/sdk-node, @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node; initialize in app.ts or telemetry.ts.

p3_findings.title: Logger always emits JSON — no pretty-printing in development
p3_findings.recommendation: Add NODE_ENV guard: emit JSON in production, readable format in development.

p3_findings.title: Two undocumented eslint-disable suppressions in production source
p3_findings.recommendation: Add // safe because: [reason] comment next to each eslint-disable line.

p3_findings.title: Dual logger import paths — store uses utils/logger directly while all other modules use wrapper
p3_findings.recommendation: Standardize on wrapper import (import logger from '../logger') everywhere.

p3_findings.title: Route latency histogram absent — p95 SLO compliance cannot be measured
p3_findings.recommendation: Add http_request_duration_seconds Histogram with method/route/status_code labels and middleware instrumentation.
p3_findings.cross_ref: QO-002 (same root cause — metrics.ts lacks histogram instrumentation)

p3_findings.title: picomatch — ReDoS via extglob + method injection
vite <=6.4.1 — Path traversal in optimized deps .map handling
p3_findings.recommendation: cd Source/Frontend && npm install vite@^8.0.0 vitest@^4.1.5

p3_findings.title: postcss <8.5.10 — XSS via unescaped </style> in CSS output
esbuild <=0.24.2 — Dev server CORS bypass
p3_findings.recommendation: Resolved by updating vite to ^8.0.0 (cascades to esbuild upgrade)

p3_findings.title: brace-expansion — Process hang via zero-step sequences

p4_findings.title: DebugPortalPage uses non-standard Verifies comment — not a valid FR ID
p4_findings.recommendation: Add a formal FR ID or note this is infrastructure exempt from traceability.
